question.label: Gap awareness
question.name: Where do you think you've fallen short of where you want to be?
question.description: Tests whether they can name their own gaps before the manager does.

assessment.note: Non-engaged answer ('asdopikaas') provides no signal on growth or clarity.

new_queue.label: Delegation challenges
new_queue.name: What part of delegation feels most challenging for you right now?
